priority_matrix.item: R01: Remove dead opts._refreshResult write in lib/http.js
R02: Remove commented-out credential block in test/integration.js
R03: Fix fallacious #getUrl test description in test/record.js
R04: Eliminate duplicate package.json read in index.js — use CONST.API
R05: Add err.type = 'empty-response' to emptyResponse() in lib/errors.js
R06: Extract buildSignal() helper to remove duplicated AbortSignal/timeout setup in lib/http.js
R07: Extract applyBody() to unify duplicated multipart/JSON body logic in lib/api.js
R08: Extract resolveEndpoint() to unify three environment-conditional endpoint functions in lib/auth.js
R09: Inline _resolveOAuth — replace trivial wrapper with Promise.resolve() directly
R10: Add fail-fast guard for single-mode missing OAuth in _getOpts
R11: Extract makeOrg() test helper to eliminate repeated connection boilerplate in test/connection.js
R12: Replace magic strings 'sandbox' and 'single' with named constants from constants.js
R13: Rename _getOpts parameter 'd' to 'input' for clarity
R14: Rename API method getBody to getBinaryContent to resolve name collision with Record.getBody
R15: Apply eslint --fix to correct spacing inconsistencies in lib/api.js
R17: Move multipart form-building into Record.toMultipartForm — restore Information Expert principle
R18: Separate private helpers from module.exports in auth.js, api.js, http.js
R19: Sub-divide lib/api.js into domain modules: crud, query, metadata, blob, url, apexrest, streaming
R20: Introduce typed request value objects to replace the pervasive opts bag pattern
R21: Separate retry state from opts bag — pass _retryCount as explicit parameter to _apiRequest
R22: Standardize on ES6 class syntax for Connection and Record
R16: (See R15) Apply ESLint fix — consolidated into R15

implementation_sequence.item: R15: Apply eslint --fix for spacing inconsistencies
implementation_sequence.rationale: Zero-risk tooling fix; normalizes code before any manual edits begin

implementation_sequence.item: R01: Remove dead opts._refreshResult write
implementation_sequence.rationale: Pure deletion of a confirmed dead write; no functional change, no dependencies

implementation_sequence.item: R02: Remove commented-out credential block in test/integration.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Pure deletion of stale dead code; zero risk

implementation_sequence.item: R03: Fix fallacious #getUrl test description
implementation_sequence.rationale: One-word string change in a test file; zero risk

implementation_sequence.item: R04: Inline CONST.API in index.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Single-line substitution; CONST is already imported, value is identical

implementation_sequence.item: R05: Add err.type = 'empty-response' to emptyResponse()
implementation_sequence.rationale: Additive change only; no existing callers break, new capability added

implementation_sequence.item: R06: Extract buildSignal() helper in lib/http.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Pure Extract Method on duplicate code; behaviour identical, tests unchanged

implementation_sequence.item: R13: Rename _getOpts parameter 'd' to 'input'
implementation_sequence.rationale: Internal rename; no external callers affected; trivial with search-replace

implementation_sequence.item: R11: Extract makeOrg() test helper in test/connection.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Test-only change; reduces boilerplate before further test modifications in Phase 2

implementation_sequence.item: R08: Extract resolveEndpoint() in lib/auth.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Extract Method on pure module-private logic; prerequisite for R12 to be consistent

implementation_sequence.item: R12: Add SANDBOX/SINGLE_MODE named constants and replace magic strings
implementation_sequence.rationale: Depends on R08 being in place so all endpoint functions are already simplified; additive to constants.js

implementation_sequence.item: R09: Inline _resolveOAuth
implementation_sequence.rationale: Removes one exported private symbol; update one test; independent of R07 and R08

implementation_sequence.item: R07: Extract applyBody() in lib/api.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Prerequisite for R17 (multipart move into Record); prepares the boundary where multipart logic lives

implementation_sequence.item: R10: Add fail-fast guard for single-mode OAuth in _getOpts
implementation_sequence.rationale: High developer experience impact; safe additive change; implement after module is stable from R07/R08

implementation_sequence.item: R14: Rename getBody to getBinaryContent
implementation_sequence.rationale: Public API change; implement in Phase 2 so a deprecation shim can be included before Phase 3 module splits

implementation_sequence.item: R21: Separate retry state from opts bag in _apiRequest
implementation_sequence.rationale: Must precede R20 (typed objects); removes opts._retryCount mutation which is the simplest first step toward immutable request objects

implementation_sequence.item: R17: Move toMultipartForm into Record
implementation_sequence.rationale: Depends on R07 (applyBody) being in place; establishes correct ownership before api.js is split in R19

implementation_sequence.item: R19: Sub-divide lib/api.js into domain modules
implementation_sequence.rationale: Depends on R17 (multipart in Record) and R07 (applyBody); extract streaming first as most isolated, then query, blob, crud, metadata

implementation_sequence.item: R18: Separate private helpers from module.exports
implementation_sequence.rationale: Must follow R19 so the final module boundaries are stable before restructuring exports; highest-risk change

implementation_sequence.item: R20: Introduce typed request value objects
implementation_sequence.rationale: Incremental; begins with RetryContext (already done via R21); full typed objects follow after module structure stabilised by R18/R19

implementation_sequence.item: R22: Standardize on ES6 class syntax for Connection and Record
implementation_sequence.rationale: Purely cosmetic; implement last so it does not create merge conflicts with structural changes in R18-R20

implementation_sequence.item: R16: (See R15) ESLint fix — consolidated
implementation_sequence.rationale: Already completed as R15 at sequence position 1
